summary: Excellent soundboard capture featuring the rare live performance of “Revolutionary Hamstrung Blues”.
review: The recording is praised as a great soundboard source, delivering clear and well‑balanced audio. Fans are especially excited about the only known live rendition of “Revolutionary Hamstrung Blues”, making this show a unique addition to any Deadhead collection.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights both superb soundboard quality and a standout, rare song; limited data results in low confidence but overall rating is high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as "great soundboard" – clear, crisp, and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on flow; emphasis is on the unique inclusion of the rare track.
